problem: Focused audio cue sweeps can find local candidates that look promising in isolation, then fail once placed in the full Aurora theme and event-gap scoring context.
strategy: Replace one cue in the latest full-theme metrics with a representative candidate capture, run the normal event-gap scorer against that synthetic theme, and block runtime promotion unless the cue and aggregate guardrails improve.
successMeasure: A candidate may be promoted only when focused keeper gates, full-theme cue gap, worst-segment risk, theme average risk, and semantic score all hold or improve.

wins: Theme average worst-segment risk improves by 0.17/10.

currentCueRow.label: Challenge Perfect
currentCueRow.focus: Compare whether a perfect challenge result feels more celebratory than the standard results cue.
currentCueRow.worstSegmentInterpretation: onset reference sub-event is not separated in runtime; the cue is collapsing multiple reference moments into one continuous segment.
currentCueRow.referenceSegmentationResolution: auto energy segmentation with role-by-role comparison
currentCueRow.playerMeaning: A perfect challenge clear occurred; this should be more celebratory than the standard result.
currentCueRow.mappingStatus: New Aurora cue slot added from the cue matrix.
currentCueRow.semanticRecommendation: Keep semantic mapping as a guardrail while acoustic/timing gaps are tuned.
currentCueRow.recommendation: Tune the onset segment first: onset reference sub-event is not separated in runtime; the cue is collapsing multiple reference moments into one continuous segment.

simulatedCueRow.label: Challenge Perfect (promotion precheck)
simulatedCueRow.focus: Compare whether a perfect challenge result feels more celebratory than the standard results cue.
simulatedCueRow.worstSegmentInterpretation: onset timbre is the leading gap: band shape/rolloff differ from the reference segment.
simulatedCueRow.referenceSegmentationResolution: auto energy segmentation with role-by-role comparison
simulatedCueRow.playerMeaning: A perfect challenge clear occurred; this should be more celebratory than the standard result.
simulatedCueRow.mappingStatus: New Aurora cue slot added from the cue matrix.
simulatedCueRow.semanticRecommendation: Keep semantic mapping as a guardrail while acoustic/timing gaps are tuned.
simulatedCueRow.recommendation: Keep as secondary pass after higher-risk audio gaps are narrowed.

nextStep: Try challengePerfect in the Aurora audio theme only as a measured runtime trial, then accept it only if full audio comparison, event gap, cue alignment, and quality scoring all hold or improve.
